programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.desc: Bored of the local playground, Dad and the kids go out bushwalking on a journey to their local creek. Cast out of her comfort zone, Bluey's eyes are opened to the beauty of the natural world.

programme.title: Fairies
programme.desc: Bluey's house has fairies! Tails are being braided, stickers are everywhere, and Mum's got a peg beard. Now the family must band together to hunt for these invisible mischief-makers.

programme.title: Stories

programme.title: Soup Songs

programme.title: 效廉出发吧
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 哈罗 你有事吗
programme.desc: 见多识广老司机沈玉琳 VS. 古灵精怪新人类曾智希 说没事的，都很有事！ 说有事的，没事找事！ 生活里每件小事都是大事！ ！ ！ 跨世代观点交锋，中外文化差异对决，【找事团】突破盲肠、呛辣开喷！支援你解决人生平交道上遭遇的各种疑难事！

programme.title: 进击的台湾
programme.desc: 努力呈现出台湾社会各行各业小人物的故事，透过这些平凡人对生活、工作的态度，让观众见证他们不凡的精采人生。

programme.title: 梦想街57号-预约你的梦想
programme.desc: 更专业、更丰富、更多元化的车款资讯，分享给观众。

programme.title: 打卡吧!我的炫FOOD日记
programme.desc: 由主持人以行脚的方式，主题式的造访各地，以时下年轻人最时兴的FB及IG打卡，创造新亮点及网路点击率，不只美食，也深度介绍各地人文风情与节日祭典等。

programme.title: 超级总动员YOYO万花筒

programme.title: 效廉出发吧
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.desc: Family is Theresa's cornerstone, which is why connecting people to their loved ones is her life's mission. In a reading she's never shared before, Theresa delivers healing messages to her son's friend.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: Orlando: Montcalm
programme.desc: Keith takes the team to see a house in the Wadeview Park neighbourhood that he's been chasing for two years due to probate issues. In Keith's mind, it's been time well-spent because of the low price.
From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.
Before heading out, the team gathers to decide who will be the dokbakja for the accommodation. But where's Dahee? In his absence, the group sets up a buffering rock-paper-scissors show in his honour.
The Dokbakz arrive at one of the top attractions in Vang Vien, where travellers from all over the world gather: the Blue Lagoon, with its emerald-clear waters.

programme.title: Paella Macaroni
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Vanished In Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing when her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents will need to make unlikely allies if they are to find their daughter before she disappears forever.

programme.title: Kidnapping In The Grand Canyon
programme.desc: When two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust an experienced hiking guide to bring them on an off-trail adventure, things go south when he takes them captive. They have to fight both man and nature.

programme.title: Tuscan Ribollita
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.

programme.title: Tuscan Breakfast For Dinner
programme.desc: Rachael makes a decadent Tuscan-style breakfast for dinner using panettone bread to make French toast, which she serves with a prosciutto and melon platter.
From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.
The four final operators who will run the stores are to be chosen today. Master Yoo Jeong-su and Jeonju Mayor Woo Beom-gi bring their sharp, career-savvy questions to an intense selection process.

programme.title: Dallas: Davis
programme.desc: Chauncey and Derek take on a partner in their zombie renovation. As the trio pools resources to flip the house on budget and on time, termite infestation and unforeseen expenses endanger profit.

programme.title: Paella Macaroni
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece prepares a pasta version of paella, a traditional Spanish dish, and gives it a Southern mac-and-cheese twist.

programme.title: Junkyard Gem
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca score a lead on an unlisted property located in a sought-after neighbourhood in Austin. However, excitement soon turns to panic when they discover that the entire house is a junkyard.

programme.title: Not So Pretty in Pink
programme.desc: Kristy and Rebecca hike up their favourite nature trail to get a bird's-eye view of a potential flip in the community of Wimberley, Texas, which is known for its big-city wealth and small-town charm.

programme.title: Tania and Sundara
programme.desc: Tania and Sundara moved to the East Coast for work and are now looking to find a permanent place to live and expand their family. They want a peaceful place near the ocean to relax and enjoy each other.

programme.title: Beyond the Readings: Restoring the Faith
programme.desc: With the power of spirit behind Theresa, her journey giving the ultimate gift of peace continues. A touching follow-up message from a podcast reading confirms Theresa's lasting impact on those in need.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: My Child Has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica and Dylan are happy parents to young Henry, but when Jessica learns that her fertility doctor is actually Henry's biological father, she pulls out all the stops to bring him to justice.

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 亲亲我好妈
programme.desc: 全职港妈查向善(江美仪)自小接受第一代虎妈于佳妍(米雪)高度严格的管教，潜移默化间对两女儿制订一系列怪兽式子女成长规条，令大女严茜瑜(江嘉敏)尤其反感，母女关系长期处于作战状态，本来担任和事佬角色的丈夫严夏(黄智贤)可从中舒缓紧张气氛，但自身面临中年危机更堕入出轨诱惑，两夫妻竟走向同屋分居关系……向善不单对内严苛，对外亦亳不手软，在家教会与袁圆(吕慧仪)斗到你死我活，幸有不惧恶势力的训导主任文嘉熙(陈敏之)驾驭有术，令两位虎妈渐成欢喜冤家，分担对方鲜为人知的虎妈辛酸；向善一心为女儿打造才女之路，但发现茜瑜与嘉熙弟弟文亮熙(何广沛)谈恋爱，向善找来嘉熙连手捧打鸳鸯，更揭出一个埋藏了十几年的秘密，母女关系濒临瓦解边缘……

programme.title: 新四十二章
programme.desc: 猪肉档老板娘朱萤娇(龚嘉欣饰)天生神力，却得了会生胡须的怪病，渴望寻找「四十二章经」宝藏内的神药治病。大学中文系教授章经(陈豪饰)多年前已醉心寻找这个传说中的宝藏，惟因一次事故大受打击，一直饱受失眠症困扰。数学天才邵桂芝(江嘉敏饰)机灵聪敏，对急症室病房男护士柯建宁(周嘉洛饰)一见倾心。桂芝游走于正邪之间，也极想找到宝藏，以求一朝发达。章经、萤娇和桂芝因缘际会之下相遇，为抢夺宝藏而各出奇谋，争夺过程中开展了人性的善恶争战，斗过你死我活……

programme.title: 搜神传
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 洛神
programme.desc: 甄宓﹝蔡少芬﹞为绝色美人，一代枭雄曹操﹝刘丹﹞以宓乃其故人之后为名，垂涎宓美色为实，故奉甄家为上宾。宓身边的男子莫不为其惊世之貌而倾倒，操长子丕﹝陈豪﹞及叁子植﹝马浚伟﹞亦不例外。丕刚毅勇武，不惜冒犯操救宓于险境中；植才华洋溢，细心温柔。宓本对二人皆有好感，惟其后看清丕为人器量狭窄而对其失望。反观植，其与宓根本是一对壁人，一个郎才，一个女貌。然在操的旨意下，宓被配婚予丕，成为政治斗争的牺牲品。宓忍痛下嫁丕，植万分痛苦，变得文思不再。操死，丕终于登上帝位，惟丕仍担心植会觊觎帝王之位，一直有加害植之意。后丕误信谣言，以为其子叡实为植之骨肉，赐宓毒酒。宓死，丕将植贬斥远地。及丕驾崩，叡继续将植流放。植心灰意冷，行至洛水之滨，朦胧间看见一女神在水中起舞，从而写下传诵千古的《洛神赋》。

programme.title: Principles With Bill Belichick and Ray Dalio
programme.desc: The hosts sit for a special conversation with two titans, football coach Bill Belichick and Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio, to learn their guiding principles for success.

programme.title: The Deadly Quest for Gold in South Africa
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: The Scandal That Rocked the Philippines
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: Corruption as Cancer
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: The Making of a Chinese Spy
programme.desc: Ji Chaoqun was a promising young engineer from Beijing heading to the US to study. Then China’s spy agency came calling with bags of cash, the promise of glory and an offer that would change his life forever.

programme.title: The Secret Kingpin Behind Iran's Oil Empire
programme.desc: Bloomberg Investigates takes viewers on an immersive journey to the heart of our most powerful reporting. Each investigation is recounted by award-winning journalists.

programme.title: How to Spot a Russian Deepfake
programme.desc: The award-winning series that sets out to uncover the truth behind some of the most powerful stories from around the world.

programme.title: The Zombie Debts Making Wall Street Rich
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: North Korea's Hidden Remote IT Scheme
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Murder on Rainbow Mountain
programme.desc: Rainbow Mountain offers tourists a picture-perfect view that has flooded social media feeds. But behind this viral beauty spot is the story of a community at war and cries for help ignored.

programme.title: Inside A UK Care Visa Scam
programme.desc: Alleged scammers in the UK are accused of defrauding would-be migrant healthcare workers out of tens of thousands of pounds. Some victims have turned to a vigilante "scammer hunter" for help.

programme.title: Week in the Life of an F1 Driver
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: The Future of Ferrari
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Inside the Miami Grand Prix
programme.desc: Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel tackles the complexities of putting on the race, and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it's key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: Inside Motorsport Valley's High-Tech Future
programme.desc: Williams Team Principal James Vowles and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: How Youth Sports Became a $38 Billion Play
programme.desc: Major League Baseball Hall of Famer Cal Ripken Jr. and his brother Bill have turned youth sports into big business. But can they chase profits while preserving what's best for kids?

programme.title: NBA President Stokes Africa's Hoop Dreams
programme.desc: Toronto Raptors President Masai Ujiri leads the only non-US team in the National Basketball Association, and he's spearheading an effort to take the game global.

programme.title: Robots: The Aliens We Made
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets some of the world's most advanced, intelligent, robots. Will the creation of a synthetic species with human-like intelligence improve the human experience, or end it?

programme.title: Love in the Age of Machines
programme.desc: Can we have real intimacy with machines? Emily Chang explores the future of such connections and the technologies powering a growing market of relationships-on-demand.

programme.title: Your Brain Is the Next Tech Frontier
programme.desc: From brain implants that allow paralyzed patients to communicate to the wearable devices enhancing our capabilities, brain-computer interfaces could change the way we use our minds forever.

programme.title: How Tech Is Breaking the Rules of Biology
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology. In this episode of Posthuman, we explore the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how we die.

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.desc: Audi moves from her village to Jakarta to work at her uncle's coffee shop. She soon finds herself caught in a complicated love triangle between Rangga, the wealthy son of the shop owner, and Fero, a hardworking fellow employee.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Pesona 34-ku Bakalan Badabest Meluluhkan Hatimu
programme.desc: A reckless Surya (Bastian Steel) nearly crashes his car into the motorcycle driven by Citra (Sitha Marino). Citra is furious, leading to a fierce roadside argument with the speeding, hot headed Surya.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: IM ADDICTED TO NENG NASI UDUK CANS
programme.desc: After a rebellious escape from his restrictive life, Gibran crosses paths with Suci, a humble girl who sells nasi uduk. Determined to change his ways, Gibran sets out on a mission to win her heart and prove he is her dream match.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: 34 Hari Nyender di Hati Ketua Khapunkhap
programme.desc: Jirayut travels to Indonesia to find the mother who left him as a child. He meets Halda, a ketoprak vendor who offers to help. However, Halda secretly plots to hire a 'fake mother' to secure a share of the inheritance left by Jirayut’s father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bukan Preman Bener Tapi Beneran Preman
programme.desc: Aldo (Ridho Illahi), a local thug, tries to sneak into a haunted house without paying, sparking a war of words with the feisty Qia (Indah Nicole). After his girlfriend dumps him for his criminal lifestyle, Aldo finds himself drawn to Qia, even as his own father plots to shut down the night market entirely.

programme.desc: Janakambal, a successful entrepreneur, wants her reckless grandson Cibi to succeed her. She brings in Tamil to set him straight, but can he really change?

programme.title: Gettimelam
programme.desc: After facing humiliation from her family, Lakshmi vows to build a new house. Sivaraman joins her in this mission. But as they take on family responsibilities, will their dream be left behind?

programme.title: Veera
programme.desc: Rannvijay raises his half-sister Veera as his own child, while their mother Ratan, though showing contempt towards Veera, secretly supports her son in raising her.

programme.title: Chinnanchiru Kiliye
programme.desc: Indhu, a self-made woman who won't bow or borrow, clashes with Karna, an enforcer of fear-driven patriarchy, triggering a powerful upheaval that shakes the empire everywhere.

programme.title: Thirumangalyam
programme.desc: Title: Mahasangamam The story of Lakshmi, an innocent orphan raised by her grandmother. Unexpectedly married into a wealthy family, she discovers her husband Nanthan loves his cousin Dhivya. Choosing not to stand in his way, Lakshmi walks away, torn between her dreams and harsh reality. A heartfelt love triangle woven with deep family drama.

programme.title: Parijadam
programme.desc: After losing her parents and hearing in a tragic accident, Isai is forced to marry Vishal when her aunt Rukmini manipulates her horoscope to meet Subadra's strict astrological beliefs.

programme.title: Ayali
programme.desc: Tamizhselvi wants to be a doctor, but her village's old customs hold women back. Can she overcome these traditions in Veerappannai and achieve her dream?

programme.title: Vaagai Sooda Vaa
programme.desc: Veluthambi dreams of a government job but ends up teaching poor village kids. When he discovers they're being forced into bonded labour, he resolves to fight for their freedom.

programme.title: The House: Ezurin Khyra
programme.desc: The House menampilkan Ezurin Khyra yang sering menjadi sorotan kerana imej glamornya. Program ini juga menayangkan keperibadian ibu kepada lima orang cahaya mata ini yang tidak diketahui umum.

programme.title: Sesat
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: Kebun Urban
programme.desc: Razif akan menemuramah serta mencungkil rahsia petani-petani kecilan di Malaysia yang menanam sayuran dihalaman rumah mereka. Razif dan Sherson Lian akan memasak resipi ringkas menggunakan tanaman mereka.

programme.title: From KL to PL S2
programme.desc: Nabil, Intan bersama dua rakan pasukan selebriti yang baru; Bang Med & Mierul teruja menerima jemputan misteri untuk cabaran penalti menentang lagenda bola sepak di England.

programme.title: Konsert Gegar Vaganza S8
programme.desc: 13 penyanyi profesional dan berpengalaman ke pentas untuk bersaing dan merebut gelaran juara Gegar Vaganza S8.

programme.title: Ready Set Action S2
programme.desc: Travelog artis-artis tempatan membawa peminat bertuahnya untuk meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal dalam Ready, Set, Action! musim ke 2.

programme.title: Karokgram
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti yang menyaksikan 2 artis undangan bersaing melakukan 5 cabaran untuk karaoke secara terbuka. Mereka perlu menyanyi apabila microphone karaoke dan Ipad memainkan lagu.

programme.title: Karok La Kau!
programme.desc: Menampilkan seramai 78 orang selebriti berentap antara satu sama lain di pentas karaoke yang luar biasa.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Healing With Zizan S2
programme.desc: Rancangan bual bicara Zizan Razak dimana dia bersama tetamu jemputan yang berlatar belakangkan alam semulajadi. Rancangan ini mengandungi komedi dan isi yang mengamit hati tentang isu-isu seorang lelaki.

programme.title: Chalie
programme.desc: Jiwa wanita susah untuk difahami-kisah Chalie yang menghadapi konflik diri sehingga menyebabkan dia terpaksa 'berpisah' dengan suami tercinta.Namun dia mula melalui pelbagai cabaran tanpa suaminya di sisi

programme.title: Ep 2285 Olivia Rodrigo / Richard Gadd / The Crew Of Nasa's Artemis Ii Moon Mission
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Olivia Rodrigo, Richard Gadd and the crew of NASA’s Artemis II Moon Mission, and musical performance Bruce Hornsby. (US TX: 30 Apr 2026).

programme.title: Ep 2290 Sigourney Weaver / Andrew Rannells
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon with guests Sigourney Weaver and Andrew Rannells, and musical performance by The Black Keys. (US TX: 12 May 2026).

programme.desc: In sun-drenched San Diego, entrepreneur and real estate developer Gina Champion-Cain lures in investors with a glamorous, beachy image and promises of sky-high returns on short-term liquor license loans.

programme.title: Ep 3 Leading Through Disruption
programme.desc: As AI, geopolitical tension and supply chain upheaval redefine the business landscape, leading CEOs discuss how organizations can stay resilient and competitive. From strategy to culture, they explore what it takes to lead through constant disruption.

programme.title: Ep 7 What's Driving Growth: Ireland's Pharma Bet And India's Wealth Shift
programme.desc: The show that explains the why behind the headlines. This edition explores how Ireland became a global pharmaceutical powerhouse - and the risks of becoming too dependent on a handful of multinational companies. It also examines why India’s wealth is shifting from traditional assets such as gold and property into startups, as a new generation of investors reshapes the country’s capital landscape.

programme.title: Ep 20 Reed Group's James Reed
programme.desc: James Reed reflects on the decision that defined his career - taking the risk of joining the family business. The Reed CEO discusses failure, purpose and why standing still is the worst decision of all.

programme.desc: Home-sharing app Airbnb forever changed how we travel. CEO Brian Chesky gives a candid interview about the strategies that helped him build a multibillion-dollar empire by convincing people to open their homes to strangers and let them sleep in their beds.

programme.title: The wily little granny
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Ernest and Celestine at the museum
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: The rice festival
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: Farming engineer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Dustbin
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Paws for thought
programme.desc: Rabbit and Tortoise take part in the 400 metres hurdles. When Tortoise takes a fall during the race, Rabbit decides to be supportive and help her opponent across the finishing line.

programme.title: Brick vs Block
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Heliport
programme.desc: The world is undergoing a brutal change: technology is breaking down and all sources of energy are disappearing. All except Tes and Oskar's heads, whose hair starts to generate electricity! Using this power, they set out to find their missing mother.

programme.title: Glasses
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Bad habits
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Grasshopper
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Revenge
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Basik

programme.title: a Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Vivement Dimanche
programme.desc: On his iconic red sofa, Michel Drucker welcomes and shines the spotlight on the talent of yesterday, today and tomorrow. A main guest talks about their career, their projects and their origins...

programme.title: echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Sikou Niakate (Mali)
programme.desc: After growing up in a squat near Paris and then in a working-class neighborhood in the 19th arrondissement, Sikou became an author and director. His work explores the fractures of identity, social class, gender and racism. Through cinema and writing, he gives a voice to those condemned to silence.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Un Dimanche a La Campagne
programme.desc: A weekend together, far from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. A moment out of time to get to know one another, talk of love, friendship, life. In a house open to surprises and the unexpected, between emotion and laughter, each reveals the invisible thread of their personal story...

programme.title: Top 14 Rugby Le Mag
programme.desc: Presenting the day's action in the Top 14, the French rugby championship, with summaries and highlights from the matches, players interviews and comments.

programme.title: #Investigation
programme.desc: Your rendezvous for current affairs and investigative journalism from the RTBF teams. Research, evidence, personal stories and confrontations are at the heart of the film reports about a range of subjects mainly relating to Belgian society. The key words? Independence and transparency!

programme.title: The guardian angels of French heritage
programme.desc: From Burgundy to the Charente-Maritime, from Mont-Saint-Michel to the Chateau de Rambouillet, ''guardian angels'' work to restore French national heritage. Who are these craftsmen and women, committed to renovating the country's finest monuments and how do they organise their projects, work that is sometimes on a titanic scale?

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Sully-sur-Loire
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Chateau de Sully-sur-Loire, once a watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it was probably used by soldiers. Historical research continues to uncover its mysteries.

programme.title: Brest dockworkers
programme.desc: They are invisible but essential: the dockworkers moor and undock all the merchant ships that enter and leave the ports. Sailors on land, they live on the watch, just like on a ship. In an increasingly automated world, they are an essential link in global maritime trade.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: From Yvelines to Eure-et-Loir
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an antique shop in Yvelines. Then, she meets Manon in her workshop in Eure-et-Loir.

programme.title: Justin Fisch, naturalist and guide in Florida
programme.desc: He figures amongst the thirty Canadians aged under 30 considered the most influential in terms of sustainable development. Justin Fisch welcomes a group for a trip by canoe-kayak through the Everglades: a forty-kilometre journey to explore the famous wetlands.

programme.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Global Competition
programme.desc: With colossal investments, Americans and Chinese are vying for supremacy in the field of artificial intelligence. At the heart of this battle, generative AI, which produces texts, images and music, raises strategic and ethical issues. To limit the risks, some bodies, led by the EU, are trying to establish regulations.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Duck with Vanilla
programme.desc: Chef Anthony Limery prepares duck breast with vanilla.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: From Yvelines to Eure-et-Loir
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits an antique shop in Yvelines. Then, she meets Manon in her workshop in Eure-et-Loir.

programme.title: Brest dockworkers

programme.title: The old teddy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: The day we ate together
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: The dog with a house on his head
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.title: The cinema screen
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Here's a moose
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Belles Comptines D'afrique
programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Oscar Et Malika, Toujours En Retard
programme.desc: Oscar and Malika walk to school together. Every morning, they face funny, absurd or ridiculous situations and live improbable adventures.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ?
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Les Secrets Du Finistere - Le Garcon Qui Marchait Sur Les Vagues
programme.desc: A surfer is shot dead in the heart at La Torche. When Captain Laubier discovers on the victim's computer a video of a lecture by Le Dantec about the sunken city of Ys, he contacts her. The young woman's intuitions lead her onto unexpected paths.

programme.title: Foot! (1/2)
programme.desc: Match summaries, commentary and analyses, after each day of the Ligue 1 McDonald's, the French football championship.

programme.title: Mambar Pierrette
programme.desc: In Douala, in a poor district in the city, the everyday life of Pierrette, a seamstress who takes care of her two children and invalid mother alone. Bravely determined and discrete, she is used to getting by from day-to-day but never gives up.

programme.title: Japan
programme.desc: For 250 years Japan has thrived, largely cut off from the west - until US gunboats arrive.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul (S1)
programme.desc: In Paris, Sue samples insects and absinthe, models for Paris Fashion Week, and crashes a cabaret.

programme.title: A Great Gamble
programme.desc: Around 12,000 years ago, as the Ice Age finally thawed, humanity made a dramatic shift - abandoning nomadic life for permanent settlements.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan (S1)
programme.desc: Reza ventures into an unexplored canyon in Saudi Arabia, searching for clues of lost civilizations.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander begins in Mumbai, riding the city's gleaming new metro before venturing into a forest with the world's highest concentration of leopards. From there, he heads to Bangalore, India's tech capital, where the future and tradition sit side by side.

programme.title: Romania
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.desc: Cyril faces snapping turtles, invasive jumping carp, and dangerous gators while hunting a 200-pound alligator gar in the perilous waters of Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: 金牌特派
programme.desc: 中天主播金汝鑫带您重新检视重大的国内外案件，也同时讨论其中所包含的法律与道德争议.

programme.title: 七十二家房客
programme.desc: 七十二家房客租住一幢旧式的庭院，终日受泼辣的女房东和她卑鄙的丈夫的欺压。一名勇于发声的新房客出现，改变了租客的命运。他们合力对抗逼迁、抵制贪警，最终成功不让房东出售家园。

programme.title: 血鹦鹉
programme.desc: 据说诸魔化成的血鹦鹉，看见它的人能得到三个愿望。江湖侠盗叶停枫为追寻血鹦鹉的真相；与名捕「铁手无情」铁恨联手。某夜，叶、铁二人在坟场遇上血鹦鹉，铁死于它的魔力之下；后叶将其尸体送回家乡安葬。其后，尸体却离奇失踪，叶经历重重险阻后，终于见到真正的血鹦鹉...

programme.title: 大军阀
programme.desc: 一名土匪因助俄国抗击日本而成为北方的大军阀。由于他好大喜功又目不识丁，老百姓当他是个大笑话。后来，当年曾被他无端杀死的戏班老板之女出现，枪杀了这个卖国贼。

programme.title: 钻石艳盗
programme.desc: 两大珠宝盗贼「夜来香」和「夜爵士」前往日本，意图偷去「维纳斯的眼泪」巨钻。二人见面后即坠入爱河，却不知道原来对方同为盗取巨钻的竞敌。最后谁会得到巨钻？二人的恋情又会否无疾而终？

programme.title: 螳螂
programme.desc: 韦风奉皇帝之命潜入田家寻找田老爷造反的证据。他因此认识了田老爷的孙女，二人更结为夫妻。韦风终于取得证据，并打算与妻子离开。田老爷得知后遂萌杀机，二人恶斗下他的妻子惨死。韦风死里逃生，并自创螳螂拳法，誓要为妻子报仇。

programme.title: 魂断奈何天
programme.desc: 良才见秋容貌美，心怀不轨，竟将其迷奸。秋容醒来后为良才甜言蜜意所惑，相信他禀明父母后会娶她为妻。谁知数月后，良才音讯全无，秋容更发现自已怀有身孕，于是马上去找良才。可惜那时秋容才发现良才已另娶名门闺秀为妻，更打算将秋容灭口...

programme.title: 水儿武士
programme.desc: 水儿原是大太子之私生女，流落青楼 ，二太子欲利用水儿揭大太子丑行以谋皇位。大太子不惜派杀手暗杀水儿，而二太子则命燕十三、练飞霞等护送水儿回宫。两批人沿途激战，水儿得武士相救避祸隐居荒村，然二人性格迥异经常引起冲突。

programme.title: 凤还巢
programme.desc: 兵部侍郎程浦将次女雪娥许配予好友之子穆居易，庶室程夫人既愤且恼，对居易讹称长女雪雁乃雪娥，催促二人早日成亲。居易见雪雁貌丑而痴，吓得留书出走。富豪朱焕然对雪娥心仪已久，趁此良机冒充居易，依期迎亲......本片由李香君、金峰分饰男、女主角，配搭新鲜；而蒋光超与庄元庸一胖一瘦的谐趣演出，更令人笑破肚皮。

programme.title: 霹雳拳
programme.desc: 集贤武馆主人平伯被日高手谷岚所杀，其子铁娃入山投靠大舌头，与大之女红蝴蝶相处甚欢。时谷之子刚自日学成归来，挑拨大熊与铁。后熊与刚决战死于暗算；铁与红得悉，下山报仇...

programme.title: 花田错
programme.desc: 故事讲述千金小姐刘月英与丫鬟春兰同游花田盛会，邂逅桥边画画的落拓书生卞济。春兰眼见小姐芳心暗许，于是穿针引线，欲促成良缘，却因老家仆错认小霸王周通为卞济，使小姐与卞济情路波折重重。在经过一连串误会与错配后，结局乃皆大欢喜。

programme.title: 江湖子弟
programme.desc: 本片改编自七十年代知名小说家江之南的作品。故事描述，刘永被掠去财物，为生计打劫，开罪了欧阳帮，但帮主欣赏刘胆色，交上朋友来，后保镖李丽丽对刘有好感，却惹黑旗门胡妒忌...

programme.title: 神经大侠
programme.desc: 威力无敌的兵器鸳鸯刀将要送给满清的皇帝，却不慎落入萧中慧和袁冠南手里。大内高手卓天雄于是出发追捕二人，誓要取回鸳鸯刀。大战一触即发，此刻鸳鸯刀的秘密也同被揭开。

programme.title: 霹雳十杰
programme.desc: 本片是少林三部作的第三部。刘家辉仍饰演三德和尚，为要保护自持功夫了得便与大清高手结怨的少年英雄方世玉,差点也令少林寺陷入险境。

programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: Review Show
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.desc: The Presidential Cycling Tour of Turkey is an annual professional road bicycle racing stage race. It is the only intercontinental cycling tour in the world, often spanning both Europe and Asia. The race typically consists of 8 stages covering diverse terrains.

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 康宪得知李相泽家发生了致命火灾后传讯相赫。判昊收到了来自未知号码的神秘短信。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 乐游原
programme.desc: 改编自同名小说，讲述了朝堂动荡皇权旁落，镇守边关的皇孙李嶷（徐凯饰）被迫承担起平叛重任，与隐藏真实身份的将军独女崔琳（景甜饰）各领一军卷入纷争。二人在数次交锋中相杀相爱。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 法官大人
programme.desc: 康宪得知李相泽家发生了致命火灾后传讯相赫。判昊收到了来自未知号码的神秘短信。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: ７人的復活
programme.desc: 承接上季《7人的逃脱》剧情，讲述了在假新闻成就的城堡里梦想成为帝王的男人和逃离邪恶的7人的反击。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】为应对明塱离职潮，永成主动支援。马来西亚医疗中心因投资者涉嫌洗黑钱被捕而功亏一篑，以珈在调查过程中，发现德桥早已知悉该投资者有问题，却对她有所隐瞒。明塱允许大部份已离职的医护回巢，但带头跳槽的英杰、建邦、宇泽等人遭一妍解雇；建邦主动向启澄求和……医疗城动土仪式举行后，天秤突然倒下，永成因此受重伤，急需换肾

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 乌云之上
programme.desc: 2017年的夏天，暴雨冲刺过的南方小城，惊现碎尸。女警韩青（孙俪饰）在侦办碎尸案的同时，继续寻找着失踪的搭档钟伟（罗晋饰）。随着案件的推进碎尸案的背后竟然隐藏着毒品大案？

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 宴遇永安
programme.desc: 现代少女沈韶光（王影璐饰）与家人意外穿越至永安城，通过经营小饭馆结识京兆少尹林晏（李昀锐饰），以未婚妻身份化解危机后入住其府邸云水苑，展开融合美食经营、市井民俗的爱情。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】永成得睿晖捐肾保住性命，但身体大不如前。明塱医院山边发现疑于二十年前遭人杀害的一副男性头骨，死者正是一妍一直寻找的赵定国。以珈带领调查小组，调查收受承建商利益一事，启心带着睿晖出席，以永成兆业代表自居。 ICAC拘捕建邦，原来他正是收受利益之人。启澄发现是丽雪偷取建邦电脑内的证据，质问之下，丽雪道出是启心下命令举报建邦。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 珠玉在侧
programme.desc: 绮裴阁家主裴楚风为当朝皇后制成辉月凤冠，竞争对手苏玉轩得知消息，诓骗武林高手单敬天盗取珍宝。赵护卫舍命护冠，凤冠的水胆琥珀落入其女襁褓。敌众我寡，赵护卫坠崖，单敬天幡然醒悟，带着残损的凤冠和婴儿单单单跃下山崖。 一晃十五年，单单单的姐姐单双双调查到苏家和凤冠遗失有关，凭借高超的技艺孤身入苏玉轩，得到了少爷苏玨的青睐。

programme.title: French Kiss
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he’s dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

programme.title: This is Un-Peasant
programme.desc: A shocking hook-up divides the interior. During a day out at a beach club, sexual tension explodes in every direction. The charter guests insult the yacht crew. A deckhand puts a guest in a compromising situation.

programme.title: Bowing Out
programme.desc: The chef is tasked with preparing an unusual dish for dinner. The guests stay up late and cause damage around the boat during a night of fun during docking, sending the deck team into a panic. Some of the on-board romances heat up while others fizzle out.

programme.title: Crossing Lines
programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kiss
programme.desc: When a crew member has to leave the boat, a secret kiss happens that sends the entire crew into a spiral. The crew visits an elite sailing team and attends a flamenco show where major epiphanies occur. A surprise visitor comes aboard that could change everything.

programme.title: The Poo-Petrator
programme.desc: A blast from the past has one of the crew members desperate to reignite an old flame. New crew configurations cause resentments to blossom. A guest leaves an unwelcome surprise in the shower, setting off a mystery within the interior.

programme.title: Guilt Trip
programme.desc: Two crew members contend with whether or not to feel guilty after committing a major betrayal. Romantic entanglements on the boat get messy. A crew member returns and is shocked to discover that everything has changed.

programme.title: Break- Ups And Shake-Ups
programme.desc: A betrayal is revealed and awkwardness and confrontations follow. While a crew member is running out of time to get a second chance, a major breakup changes everything. The deck team struggles to work in the swell, which causes a huge blow up between two deckhands.

programme.title: Stricken Nuggets
programme.desc: An argument over a jet ski causes a major rift in the deck team. A long-held bromance is threatened. A heart-to-heart about commitment is interrupted and tempers flare in multiple directions.

programme.title: Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: A group of loud, brash New Yorkers board the boat and put the crew back on their heels. Bad weather keeps the boat at the dock and a considerable emergency pops up. A crew member gets injured. A long-running friendship frays.

programme.title: Baby Steps
programme.desc: The charter season comes to an end and two crew members go all in on a bad decision. A returning visitor has a pleasant surprise. Some crew members get happy endings while others exchange harsh words. For a couple of crew members, the end is just the beginning.

programme.title: Raising the Bar-Celona
programme.desc: Captain Sandy and three trusted returnees are back for another wild charter season but when two deckies are sidelined by illness, the crew struggles to get the boat ready in time for charter. Aesha worries one of her green stews may be giving her deju vu. A crewmember damages the boat on the first night.

programme.title: Stingled Out
programme.desc: The deck team struggles to find their footing, and big mistakes are made. A stew begins to flirt with all male crewmembers on board. The chef struggles to get a handle on eccentric guest requests. Tension between two deckhands escalates to a heated argument.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: A group of wealthy socialites keep the crew busy. The stews vie for attention from the guys. Meanwhile, the deck team downfall continues as major mistakes cause chaos including a deckhand that floats out to sea on a jet ski.

programme.title: Tough Divisions
programme.desc: A group of young, entitled guests continue to cause chaos for the crew. The chef pulls together an over-the-top eight-course tasting menu that totally rocks and when the primary demands a late-night swim, it lands him and the crew in murky waters. Two deckhands have become a liability and Capt. Sandy and Nathan must figure out what to do about it.

programme.title: Let The Games Vegan
programme.desc: A massive changeover rocks the boat. A stew gets pulled in multiple and a flirty love triangle starts to heat up. The chef struggles to cater to vegan guests with particular palates and complaints.

programme.title: The Tempest
programme.desc: Bad weather rolls in suddenly and causes chaos. A crew member takes on a new role and shifts the group dynamic. Romance heats up on board, prompting jealousy and a crew member initiates a tearful breakup.

programme.title: Le Vie En Bros
programme.desc: A new crew member joins and whips the boat into shape. A bachelor charters the yacht along with his matchmaker in the hopes of finding love while at sea. A newly single crew member sends romantic possibilities spinning. The Chief Stew gives a sharp warning about a love triangle on board.

programme.title: French Kiss
programme.desc: The deck team comes under fire for being too lax on the job. The Primary gets in hot water with the women he’s dating. A promotion on the interior leaves a stew feeling envious. An unexpected hook-up sends shockwaves through the crew.

programme.desc: A shocking hook-up divides the interior. During a day out at a beach club, sexual tension explodes in every direction. The charter guests insult the yacht crew. A deckhand puts a guest in a compromising situation.

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾
programme.desc: 《世界第一等：菲律宾》带领观众走进充满热情与色彩的菲律宾，探索当地独特的文化、美食与人文风情。从火山地貌到街头美食，从传统疗法到社区故事，节目以轻松幽默的方式呈现菲律宾多元又迷人的面貌。

programme.title: 无限复活
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】李伯仁是澳门赌场的高手，梦想征战拉斯维加斯，却因女友离弃、朋友嘲笑而陷入困境。他冒险借钱赴赌城，手风虽顺却接连遭遇不测。一场车祸后，他在调查干探提娜面前揭开真相。命运因神秘红番回头石发生翻转，让他有机会重写人生。

programme.title: 亲爱的客栈2026

programme.title: 世界第一等:菲律宾
programme.desc: 《世界第一等：菲律宾》带领观众走进充满热情与色彩的菲律宾，探索当地独特的文化、美食与人文风情。从火山地貌到街头美食，从传统疗法到社区故事，节目以轻松幽默的方式呈现菲律宾多元又迷人的面貌。

A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant claims she's the wife of a prince; a church pastor gets sentenced for running an unlicensed funeral business; and more.
A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: Murder And Mayhem In Taipei
programme.desc: It's the biggest manhunt in Taiwan's history when three criminals rapes and murders a famous pop star's daughter, Pai Hsiao Yen, and go on to commit other crimes.

programme.title: My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: Anthony Todt
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a mom, her children, and the family dog rocks a picture-perfect Orlando suburb-all signs point to the dad, Tony Todt.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, MI, but her family and friends don't believe it. The police discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Birds And Bricks
programme.desc: Undercover agent Jerry Speziale's career shifts after a bullet; Agent Ed Newcomer probes hawk killings in California.

programme.title: Boston's Little Girl Lost
programme.desc: When an infant's body washes up on the shores of Deer Island, Massachusetts, residents rally to find out who she is, and what happened to her. Their unprecedented solidarity gets nationwide attention.

programme.title: Baby Snatchers
programme.desc: 20,000 Chinese children are kidnapped every year to feed a voracious baby trafficking industry. How did this happen? Who's behind it? And can anyone stop it?

programme.title: Food Scammers
programme.desc: No matter what you eat, at least one ingredient could have come from China. But with the country's thriving fake food industry, what you're eating could be poisoning you.

programme.title: A Chance Encounter
programme.desc: January 5, 2016, Baltimore, MD. Police officers respond to a report of a deceased man found at the Deluxe Plaza Motel in Northeast Baltimore.

programme.title: Shirley Pierce
programme.desc: When a woman is found brutally murdered in her bathtub, investigators uncover signs of a staged cleanup and a jealous rage that points to a suspect from an unexpected place.

programme.title: Ed Kemper: The Co-Ed Killer
programme.desc: This articulate and boastful killer is remembered for terrifying the coastal town of Santa Cruz in the early 1970s, but his desire to kill started when he was a young child fantasising about murder.

programme.title: Afternoon Ambush
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.
