programme.title: Afternoon Ambush
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Complex Terror
programme.desc: A deadly home invasion sparks a manhunt for a stranger terrorising a Tulsa housing complex.

programme.title: Face Off
programme.desc: Forensic dentist Dr Carl Leung recounts his work with the Hong Kong Police on the 'Hello Kitty Murder' and helping to solve a killing spree.

programme.title: Voice of the Dead
programme.desc: From identifying body parts to murder disguised as suicide, Taiwan's veteran forensic pathologist unravels these vicious lies.

programme.title: Melissa Lucio
programme.desc: Melissa Lucio was sentenced to death for the murder of her two-year-old daughter, Mariah, and in January 2022 she was given an official execution date of April 27, 2022.

programme.title: Unholy Man
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: Lovers, Lies And Canyon Murder
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: Bob (Part B)
programme.desc: After learning his partner was stealing, enduring heart surgery, and facing other hardships, Bob withdrew into his 7,000-sq-ft Victorian mansion, filling it with antiques.

programme.title: Andre McDonald
programme.desc: An American Dream becomes a tragedy when San Antonio businesswoman Andreen McDonald goes missing. Four years later, her husband, Air Force Major Andre McDonald, is on trial for her murder.

programme.title: Negligent Midwife Or Responsible Caregiver?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy. The defence says she made the right calls, but the prosecution charges her with negligent child abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Nightclub Murder Or Self-Defense Shooting?
programme.desc: An argument erupts outside a Florida nightclub. One man is killed, and another is charged with murder. Was it a case of cold-blooded murder, or did he have to shoot to save his own life?

programme.title: J Music
programme.desc: 《J Music》致力打造高质音乐平台，一众歌手有展示音乐实力的机会之余，也可让乐迷更深入了解歌手的音乐故事。节目邀请「人气」歌手担任嘉宾，由嘉宾亲自挑选其喜欢的新旧作品，并即场演唱，分享喜爱曲目。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 直播灵接触
programme.desc: 《直播灵接触》载誉归来，第二季继续由「鬼王」梁思浩带领主持拍档黄耀英、黄紫恩，以及小编黄滢仴、汤之欣，为观众带来更多惊吓与惊喜。每集锁定不同灵异主题，诚邀「重量级」嘉宾讲鬼故，揭开法科风俗与行业秘闻。

programme.title: 新闻透视
programme.desc: 《新闻透视》，每周专题报道多段香港以至国际的瞩目新闻，聚焦港人最关心的民生话题，并邀请各界人士、学者、专家，一同深入探讨个中来龙去脉。

programme.title: 周六聊Teen谷
programme.desc: 踏入科技年代，青少年对新兴电子产品、网络流行媒体尤感兴趣，追上时代步伐，已成新世代指标！主持陈星妤、陈懿德、王菲用尽所能搜罗世界各地至潮、至新情报，上至世界盛事、医学百科、文艺与科技；下至日常生活、网络热搜，跟观众一一分享。

programme.title: 自然系女子旅行
programme.desc: 台湾露营胜地美不胜收！港女主持林映晖联同台湾三大女神林襄、张雅涵和黄上晏，来一趟自然系疗愈旅行。她们穿梭南投、高雄、桃园等地，深入苗栗山区，试遍森林小木屋、高级露营车、豪华帐篷、棒球场露营等。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 香港早晨
programme.desc: 报道香港、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 开心无敌奖门人
programme.desc: 《奖门人系列》踏入25周年，「奖门人」曾志伟宣布节目载誉归来！奖门人带领钱嘉乐、阮兆祥，以及新加入的「奖老」麦美恩、程浩骏、吴嘉仪，每集广邀最好玩的嘉宾好友，参与多个爆笑游戏，送上无穷无尽的欢乐笑弹！

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: Hands Up
programme.desc: 儿童节目《Hands Up》鼓励小朋友勇于发问，表达自我，向目标进发！吉祥物「酱汁家族」成员跟一众主持演出短剧，陪伴大家度过愉快时光。另会带来多首儿歌，让孩子们边唱边学习生活知识。

programme.title: 隐门
programme.desc: 庄子乔 和张心月 是儿时朋友，因彼此父亲犯下罪行，他们走上了截然不同的道路。数年后重逢又会带来什么样的发展？

programme.title: 隐门
programme.desc: 庄子乔 和张心月 是儿时朋友，因彼此父亲犯下罪行，他们走上了截然不同的道路。数年后重逢又会带来什么样的发展？

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 新闻掏宝
programme.desc: 《新闻掏宝》带大家在宝库「掏」新闻宝藏，除了昔日特辑、直播和系列报道，还有从未曝光的珍贵片段，观众有机会重温李小龙出殡、宝生银行劫案、四人帮审讯、英女王访港、的士罢驶、中英签订联合声明、戴卓尔夫人专访等。

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: <周日影院 放假 Chill>呆佬拜寿
programme.desc: 招福虽富有却刻薄，被招积设计陷害成傻佬，流落街头；望弟因愧疚收留他并日久生情。二人重返招家，在寿宴上揭发招积恶行，讨回公道。

programme.title: 港生活．港享受
programme.desc: 香港人生活多姿多采，《港生活．港享受》既呈献高贵典雅的品味生活，也会带来贴地亲民的优质享受。节目结合多元化主题，每集探索不同范畴，并请来各行各业的精英分享成功之道。

programme.title: 六点半新闻报导
programme.desc: 翡翠台每日下午六点半，报导本地、两岸及国际重要新闻。

programme.title: 星期日档案
programme.desc: 《星期日档案》，每周聚焦于热门新闻人物，特写报导；或以人性化角度，透过走访社会不同阶层，不同界别人士，深入探讨大众关切的政治、社会民生等议题。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 美食新闻周报
programme.desc: 黄嘉雯、倪嘉雯、伍倩彤等美食主播、主持，紧贴最新美食潮流，从不同平台网罗超人气餐厅消息，主持亲自试食，带来真实食评。节目精选《美食新闻报道》介绍的多间餐厅，力推当中招牌美食，并会速递美食优惠，让观众实时掌握最滋味、抵食的饮食情报。

programme.title: 晚间新闻
programme.desc: 每晚报道香港、两岸、国际重要新闻以及体育消息，让你洞悉各地大事及体坛动向。

programme.title: 财经透视
programme.desc: 《财经透视》紧贴大市，回顾每周港股走势外，并关注楼市状况，透过业界人士专访、市场分析等，深入浅出探讨本港、国际财经金融热门话题，更以专题形式报道不同行业发展面对的问题。

programme.title: 降龙大师：魔龙咒
programme.desc: 龙王被降龙大师封印了五百年，龙王之女为解除父亲的封印，不惜穿越时空，回到五百年前杀掉降龙大师。但她没想到五百年前的龙王与降龙大师竟是生死挚友...

programme.title: 僵尸叔叔
programme.desc: 偏僻山间，一僧一道比邻而居。和尚（午马 饰）随和开朗，更有一女徒菁菁（李丽珍 饰）玲珑可爱；道士（陈友 饰）古板严厉，而徒弟嘉乐（钱嘉乐 饰）却鬼马顽皮。性格不同的两个师傅口角不断，大斗其法，两个冤家徒弟也搞笑连连，笑料频出。

programme.title: 歼毒先锋
programme.desc: 退役军人吴巍和卧底刑警高天明带领特别行动小组勇闯近曼谷的孤岛，从暴徒手中救出人质。但在完成任务并准备离岛之际，吴巍发现自己的女儿被对方胁持。为救女儿及将犯罪分子绳之以法，吴巍和高天明重回危险境地，与暴徒进行了惨烈的对决。

programme.title: 油鬼子
programme.desc: 故事描述沈元（李修贤）亡父与林亚峇（谷峰）为生死之交。沈父临终前，曾在林之背上刺有神秘图案，而此图实是一道有特殊功能的符。后林为保护女儿中月（陈萍）而杀人，被判死刑；林被处死前，着沈把图案描下，以备不时之须。沈按图文指示，化身成威力无穷的油鬼子，帮助过不少人，亦铲除不少坏人，但最终却陷入疯狂状态。

programme.title: 青蛇：前缘
programme.desc: 千年前，青蛇在道清的点化下逐渐开化，生出与道清相守之心。因自己对道清的执念，却导致道清进入轮回之劫，遭受世间横死之难。为了化解道清的劫难，数百年间，青蛇不断寻找转世的道清...

programme.title: 大内密探零零发
programme.desc: 零零发是宫廷四大高手之一，专职保卫皇帝的安全。虽然不谙武功，却有着不寻常的嗜好：打造超越时代的发明。皇上被掳后，他靠着自己的过人发明救驾。

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 撞邪先生
programme.desc: 美容院职员曾小雨机缘巧合之下，认识了富豪之子利志，以为交上好运。岂料利志的父亲是茅山高人，在南洋大败一降头师时，被下咒绝子绝孙，让利志每次恋爱皆遭恶鬼破坏，无疾而终。小雨深爱利志，找大法师沈慈航帮助，授以五色驱邪带，两人顺利结婚。新婚之夜，利志遗失了驱邪彩带，果然恶鬼来犯...

programme.title: 龙门飞甲
programme.desc: 本片重拍自1966年经典武侠片《龙门客栈》，当时东厂与西厂宦官掌控朝政，腐败横行。侠客赵怀安与一群刺客联手，秘密铲除宦官势力，维护忠良与国家安定。

programme.title: 猩猩王
programme.desc: 探险家陈正风（李修贤）受聘赴印度森林搜捕猩猩王，结果误堕娱乐公司老板鲁天（谷峰）的圈套，将猩猩王带往香港表演。同行的「女泰山」阿维（伊芙莲嘉）见猩猩王惨遭捉弄摆布，伤心之余更被鲁天意图强奸。猩猩王睹状狂性大发，追击鲁天至市区，市民一片慌乱，军警如临大敌...全片的特技道具，一丝不苟，猩猩王爬上香港当时最高建筑物康乐大厦的镜头，令观众惊异万分。导演远赴泰国森林取景，还有野性美丽的女泰山伊芙莲嘉演出，令人大饱眼福。

programme.title: 游龙戏凤
programme.desc: 英俊潇洒的富商程仲森曾有过三段失败的婚姻。当他遇见在赌场担任荷官、闲暇时兼职舞蹈表演的米兰，两人迅速坠入爱河。然而，当他提出签署婚前协议书的那一刻，这段刚萌芽的恋情随即面临严峻考验。

programme.title: 我的野蛮同学
programme.desc: 在一间Band5学校有个打擂台的传统，学生会在课室将很多张书桌拼成一个擂台，在擂台上进行决胜去解决一切争执。四个性格各异的少年石头、Edward、亚凤、Seven意外地成为朋友，共同经历了难忘的成长体验...

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant / The Crew Cooks Up A Community Soup
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Croc-A-Bye Baby / Wanna Eampanada? / If The Boot Fits / Pinata Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots babysit some rowdy crocs. // Dora and Boots get the Troll to try an empanada at Benny's stand. // Boots tries new wacky new boots that Tico invented. // The twins have their first pinata party, but no one can figure out how to open it.

programme.title: Wonky Wishing Wand / Bip Bip's Big Show
programme.desc: Big Red Chicken's magic goes wonky and not only shrinks himself, but causes wacky things to happen throughout the rainforest. Dora has to fix it! // Bip Bip has a concert with Tico, but he's lost! Dora and Boots have to get him to the show on time.

programme.title: Barbazoo Can't Say ''No'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: The Seven Foods / The Perfect Portrait
programme.desc: The Barbababies think their food can make them change colours and shapes. They decide to find the right food for each of them. // Barbabeau lacks inspiration, he can't create anymore. The whole family helps by suggesting new subjects to paint.

programme.title: Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.title: Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: All Star Pups! / Pups Save Sports Day
programme.desc: It's monkey mayhem as pups play kickball against Raimondo's team, until an eagle steals the ball. // The All Star Pups are ready to compete in the summer sports day when Daring Danny X turns the field into an ice rink!

programme.title: Pups in a Jam / Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Innovation Melting Pot / Make Up Your Mind Barbazoo
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: The Lost Egg / The Elf Games
programme.desc: Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird find an egg. A chick hatches from the egg and the children must find the mummy bird. // Ben is in training for the Elf Games. Holly wants to join in but the rules state there is no flying or magic allowed.

programme.title: Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tailball
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Bridge
programme.desc: Rubble and his construction pup family gear up to build a bridge, only to find the villainous Speed Meister has a different idea. It's up to Rubble & Crew to work together and save the day by building a new, safe bridge to Builder Cove.

programme.title: The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: The Amazing Stunt Kitty
programme.desc: When a big stunt goes awry, Darington is sent flying away on an out-of-control balloon! Now, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Darington's sidekick Stunt Kitty to save the day!

programme.title: Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Making Bread / From One Pit to Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Sea Turtle Submarine
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are at the beach when they meet an adorable new friend: Shelly the sea turtle! But when Shelly can't find her way home to the Seaweed Forest, Blaze turns into a Sea Turtle Submarine to help lead the way!

programme.title: The Clean Machine
programme.desc: When three of Blaze's friends end up in messy trouble, Blaze must save them by turning into the soapiest, sudsiest cleaning machine of all time: Clean Machine Blaze!

programme.title: The Crew Celebrates Builder Covegiving Day / The Crew Builds A Rocket Ship Ride
programme.desc: After Speed Meister sabotages Builder Covegiving Day, it's up to the pups to save the holiday for everyone in Builder Cove. // Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: The Crew Raises A Runway / The Crew Builds A Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build // Rubble & Crew build a supersized skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show. But when it rolls out of control, the pups lead the chase!

programme.title: Pups Save the Elephant Spa / Pups Save an Underwater Otis
programme.desc: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa. // Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis's claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

programme.title: Pups vs. The Hum-Flectors / Pups Save a Capybara
programme.desc: A drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn. // The Paw Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

programme.title: Too Many Swipers / Bateo's Home Run
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Swiper re-join with his duplicates and make it to Grandma's picnic. / Dora and Boots help Bateo the Bat get to the baseball game in time to play.

programme.title: Singin' in the Tub
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show.

programme.title: Moon Cow
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: Nebulator
programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: George's Birthday
programme.desc: Today is George's birthday and Mummy and Daddy Pig have a special day planned. George gets a new Brontosaurus toy and the family go to the museum to see lots of different dinosaurs.

programme.title: Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in Grandpa Pig's garden when they find a little snail. Then Grandpa also shows them his beehive.

programme.title: Sports Day
programme.desc: It is Sports Day at Peppa's playgroup. There are lots of exciting events, including running, jumping and the "tug of war". Daddy Pig tells Peppa that it's not the winning that matters.

programme.title: GrandDad Dog's Garage
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: Hiccupism / Silence please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Big Rig Blaze
programme.desc: When a windstorm blows away the supplies for Stripes' Animal Party, Blaze transforms into the one Monster Machine strong enough to haul it all back - a Big Rig! There's nothing he can't pull with that Big Rig Force!

programme.title: Space Alien Adventure!
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ make friends with a space alien named Gormy! But when Gormy's jetpack loses power, they set out to help him find six special space batteries so he can fly home to his alien family!

programme.title: The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: Pups Save the Runaway Turtles / Pups Save the Shivering Sheep
programme.desc: Daring Danny X accidently drives off with turtle eggs. // Farmer Al's sheep runaway and Mayor Humdinger's kittens go missing.

programme.title: Pups Save the Squirrels / Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard! // It's a switcheroo situation when a joey is separated from its mama. It's up to the pups to save a roo and the day!

programme.title: Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: Rocket Race / Magic / Parents
programme.desc: Tommy is in a Rocket Race, Tim supports his brother. // Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine. // The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Boots / Moon Parrot / Tailball
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control. // Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot. // Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: Crabby Wedding / The Cloud Kingdom
programme.desc: Dora's crab friends are getting married but Swiper swipes the ring and loses it in the ocean. Dora has to get the ring back! / Dora and Boots meet Vicky the Vicuna who is missing her magic flute that she needs to go back to the Cloud Kingdom.

programme.title: Chatterbox
programme.desc: Peppa Pig talks far too much. Or at least so Suzy thinks. In response, Peppa decides that she is never going to talk, ever again. But this does not last for very long at all.

programme.title: Mr Fox's Van
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig needs a new watch, Mr Fox finds three grandfather clocks in the back of his van. Three clocks are much better than one. Mr Fox has everything in his van - even a chicken!

programme.title: Chloe's Big Friends
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to play with Cousin Chloe and her friends, but the older children don't want to play any "baby" games.

programme.title: Gym Class
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children to Grampy Rabbit's gym class, where at first they think all the stuff to do is scary, but Grampy Rabbit tells the kids about how he explored a jungle, helping the kids get over their fears.

programme.title: The Blackberry Bush
programme.desc: Peppa and her family collect apples and blackberries in Granny and Grandpa Pig's garden to make a pie.

programme.title: Pottery
programme.desc: Mrs Zebra teaches Peppa, George, Zoe, Zaza and Zuzu Zebra how to make a real tea set from clay.

programme.title: Nanny Plum's Lesson / Mrs Witch
programme.desc: Nanny Plum gets blown away. Ben, Holly and Gaston the Ladybird come to her rescue. // Queen Thistle reads Ben and Holly a book about a nasty witch, so Nanny takes them to meet a real one. But Nanny is rude, and the witch freezes her with magic.

programme.title: Pups Get Skunked / Pups and a Whale of a Tale
programme.desc: When Everest gets sprayed by a skunk, the pups delicately try to tell her she needs a bath! // The pups put a new spin on freeze tag after they fly far north to help free a baby whale that's trapped under the ice.

programme.title: Pups vs. A Neon Humdinger
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, the Paw Patrol must stop it from rolling through town.

programme.title: The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: Finders Keepers / Dancing Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile takes the motto "finders, keepers" a bit too far. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile arrange a dance performance for Mrs. Flores after they find her old dance shoes.

programme.title: The Barbababies Have Got Talent / Triple Switcheroo
programme.desc: Every barbababy is invited to show their greatest talent on stage. // Video games are fun, but you also need to know how to enjoy the nice weather!

programme.title: How Big Tech Is Making Fools of Us

programme.title: John Safran

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 饥饿游戏
programme.desc: 史上最饿劣的食竞节目! 节目首创以"饥饿"为实境主轴, 想要摆脱'饿'名, 就必须无'饿'不作, 让饥饿指数归零, 成为最后赢家!

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
